title: derris ovalifolia
intro: Derris ovalifolia, also known as Derris, is a perennial flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which are used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections.
